process clear request, Clears the database.

Clears the database.

processes Creates a new game request

accesses database for game
GameModel
creates a game
JoinGameRequest
processes request to Verifies that the specified game exists, and, if a color is specified, adds the caller as the requested color to the game.
JoinGameResult
result of Verifies that the specified game exists, and, if a color is specified, adds the caller as the requested color to the game.
JoinGameService
Verifies that the specified game exists, and, if a color is specified, adds the caller as the requested color to the game.

process request Gives a list of all games

result of Gives a list of all games

Gives a list of all games.

processes Logs in an existing user (returns a new authToken)
LoginResult
result of Logs in an existing user (returns a new authToken).
LoginService
Logs in an existing user (returns a new authToken)
LogoutRequest
processes Logs out the user represented by the authToken
LogoutResult
Logs out the user represented by the authToken
LogoutService
Logs out the user represented by the authToken
